# HTTP 서버 / HTTP Server / Seva ya HTTP

## 생성 방법
```bash
crownycode gen "HTTP 서버 만들어줘" -t rust -o server.rs
crownycode gen "create an HTTP server" -t python -o server.py
crownycode gen "tengeneza seva ya wavuti" -t rust -o server.rs
```

## 실행
```bash
# Python
python3 server.py

# Rust
rustc server.rs -o server && ./server
```
